suites_to_run.scope: Workspace cloning — deep copy via SECURITY DEFINER RPC + settings UI
suites_to_run.method: Static analysis of migration, API route, client wrapper, settings page
checks: Migration 018 defines clone_workspace(p_workspace_id, p_user_id, p_org_id) SECURITY DEFINER function
clone_workspace copies: workspace + tabs + sections + steps + connections + teams + roles + people + tools + step_roles + stages + touchpoints + touchpoint_connections (13 tables)
clone_workspace uses UUID remapping via temp tables (old→new mapping preserved for internal FKs)
clone_workspace does NOT copy: perspectives, annotations, comments, tasks, runbooks, activity_log, coloring_rules
Clone API route: POST /api/v1/workspaces/[id]/clone/route.ts exists with auth guard
Clone route calls supabase.rpc('clone_workspace') with workspace_id, user_id, org_id
Clone route returns new workspace data via successResponse envelope
Clone route calls void logActivity() for audit trail
Client wrapper: cloneWorkspace(workspaceId) in client.ts calls POST via apiFetch
Settings page: Duplicate Workspace button exists in page.tsx
Loading state: isCloning useState controls button disabled/spinner
Navigation: router.push to new workspace path on success
Error handling: try/catch with user-facing error message on failure

suites_to_run.scope: Conditional step coloring — verify iter 96 acceptance still holds post-merge
checks: Migration 019 creates coloring_rules table with criteria_type enum
Coloring rules CRUD API: route.ts (GET list, POST) + [id]/route.ts (PATCH, DELETE)
HEX_COLOR_REGEX validation in POST and PATCH handlers
VALID_CRITERIA_TYPES validation in PATCH handler
ColoringTintContext defined in canvas.ts
canvas-view.tsx fetches rules, evaluates in position order (last match wins), provides tint map via context
step-node.tsx consumes ColoringTintContext, applies 15% opacity background (hex alpha 26)
Heat map precedence: coloring tint suppressed when heat map active
coloring-panel.tsx accessible via paintbrush button (absolute overlay z-10)
Process canvas only (canvas-view.tsx, not journey-canvas-view.tsx)

suites_to_run.scope: Activity page user display — server/client query parity
checks: page.tsx select uses: '*, users!activity_log_user_id_fkey(email)'
route.ts select uses identical shape: '*, users!activity_log_user_id_fkey(email)'
activity-view.tsx renders entry.users?.email (not 'Unknown' for valid entries)
Empty state guidance text: 'Actions like creating steps, adding comments, and completing runbooks appear here.'
Load More re-fetches from API with same joined select shape
